item.dc:creator: Snooj

item.title: I'm tired boss, but there's still work to do.
item.description:
On June 14th of this year, a gunman entered the home of Minnesota State Representative Melissa Hortman and her husband Mark. At 3 o'clock in the morning, the coward entered the house and killed Melissa, Mark, and their Golden Retriever Gilbert, and gunned them down while they slept.
When Hortman and her husband were murdered, Trump, being the spoiled child that he is, threw a temper tantrum and refused to call Gov. Tim Walz. You know, the guy who ran against JD Vance as Kamala Harris's running partner? The guy who repeatedly humiliated both Trump and Vance while remaining civil, simply by pointing out truths? Yeah. Trump said "Fuck those Dems." and ignored what happened. https://apnews.com/article/trump-walz-minnesota-lawmakers-shot-call-064092d14bea4c3141da31b7a5e5c9b3
But now that Charlie Kirk is gone, Trump has decided to issue an order that all flags be flown at half mast for Kirk. For FOUR DAYS. Despite him not being a veteran, a government official, or a politician of any kind. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/sep/11/trump-administration-news-updates-today-latest
Why am I posting this? Because I was born in the USA. I've lived here my whole life. I'm old, and I'm tired. I've been through way too much, and for a while now I've been ready to call it a day. But that would be giving up. And I'd rather go down fighting, even if it's the most painful, horrific thing I'll ever experience. My entire family is from the Netherlands. During the Nazi occupation in WW2, my great grandfather stole a Nazi officer uniform, drove up to the gates of Amersfoort, and directed a prisoner transfer. Of his wife and their children. Who had been abducted by the Nazis weeks prior. They were shackled and placed in his car, and he drove off into the night. He did not resurface until well after the war ended. He, his wife, and his children survived. Half of my family did not. They died in concentration camps. In fear. In pain. In the most horrific ways anyone could ever imagine. Choking on poison gas. Starving to death. Raped. Beaten. Shot. My wife is Hispanic, born in Texas. We traced back her family at least 200 years, all of it in the USA. She's a citizen, more than I am. My parents were Dutch citizens in the US when I was born. I have birthright citizenship. But because I'm white, no one bats an eye. But she's asked on an almost weekly basis "Where are you from?" She's endured people screaming at her to go back home to Mexico. People yelling "Sieg Heil!" from their cars while doing a Nazi salute. In the face of all of this, how can I not fight? How can I leave to this to someone else, and hope for the best, when the woman I've loved for twenty five years is terrified of what tomorrow will bring? Terrified that if she goes to town alone, she won't come back. That I'll be left alone at home, waiting for her to come back, not knowing what happened to her. That ICE will ignore her status as a citizen, and she'll end up in prison for no reason at all. I'm old. I'm tired. I'm broken. But that doesn't matter, because I'm still here. Don't give up. Whatever you do, do not give up. It's already happening again, but we can stop it. The price we might have to pay is high, but for all you hold dear, for every person you love, do not give up. Please. Don't give up.
item.dc:creator: CallMeCourierSix

item.title: There are Liberals who think we should mourn the loss of Julius Streicher. I disagree.
item.description: Except for the last one, these were all stolen from a post on bluesky, but I don't feel comfortable providing the source-tweet in case there's any backlash or harassment by fascists or civility-warrior centrists who ultimately serve fascists with their greater hostility towards Leftists and progressives than they have towards said fascists. My condolences to political snake, Gavin Newsom, for the loss of his dear friend and kindred spirit.
item.dc:creator: Decitron

item.title: Good morning!
item.description:
Slider theme is a great addition
In personal news, I had a home nurse visit for all of 2 weeks before I got discharged. She called my recovery "miraculous". So yeah, I'm doing pretty good. Also saw a Tesla hit another car in a parking lot lol.
item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: He was committed to the bit until the end and for what? To demonize an already persecuted, small group of people who simply want to live fulfilling lives that align with who they are?...
item.description: Well, I've got some news for you MAGA out there: trans people are not going away. Not now, not ever. They've been here for millennia, and will be around (hopefully thriving) for many years to come. I'm not sure there's an entirely tasteful way to say this, but you lost your life for nothing, Charlie. What a waste. PS: All that being said, we still need stricter gun control policies/laws, and better/more affordable healthcare for mental illness. 3,400 mass shootings in 10 years is just insane when you see it written down...

item.title: Brittney Nicole Leftridge. Her murder mattered but I have to see the face of someone who welcomed violence!
item.description:
My beautiful daughter. Shot in the back in 2020 by a “man” who claimed to love her. Not news…
He is white and has enough money to pay an attorney to get continuances. Not news…
If her murderer was an immigrant they would have her face everywhere to exploit my pain. But he was one of them… so not news. Most viral!! You guys are the best!!! Thank you Imgur! She introduced me to you and you keep her alive for me!!!
item.dc:creator: beesmama4ever

item.title: The flags should’ve been lowered for Melissa Hortman
item.dc:creator: jee22

item.title: I miss both of you.
item.description: 24 years ago today, at the age of three, I lost both of my parents. Based on the date, it wouldn't take much guessing to figure out what happened. This year, I'm going to assume everyone is familiar with the event and not get too much into it. Today, I'm in Nee York City visiting the memorial, I uploaded this generic photo of it because I'm turning my phone off, I'm not taking a camera, and I'm just cutting the outside world off for a few hours to be alone with my siblings. I wanted to write the following to my parents, I realize it might be silly to you all, but it helps me. Mom, dad; This last January, your triplet grandsons were born. I can already tell their older sisters are going to help turn them into proper gentlemen. I realize she's not really family by blood, but I'd like to tell you that my stepdaughter started med school in Tokyo this year. I met her when she was 10, but it feels like she's mine anyway. My oldest and the twins start school in Japan as soon as we leave NYC. I reunited with mom's sister and mother, and they want all of my kids to spend some time over there. They've all become obsessed with cooking, I have a feeling they're going to open up a family restaurant one day. My nieces will be joining them in Japanese school. I have a feeling they're going to grow up and be involved in the space industry like their mom. They're already obsessed with watching rockets on TV. My older siblings all got back from deployment. They're all fighter pilots like you, dad, and I think you would approve of my sister's new husband, even though he's a jarhead. Not much is new with the rest of us this year, other than moving closer to home. But on the bright side, there's not much to worry about. We're all doing good. I'm going to get dressed and go now, I'm going to visit the memorial. I love you both.
item.dc:creator: DrElizabethTakeda

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Wall
item.description: Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Beanie and her crinkle ball. She loves balls of all shapes and sizes. I caught this in the middle of her being wild and crazy. I'll upload the rest of the photos from her wild play session to the ko-fi. (all critter pics are 100% free for everyone to enjoy) https://ko-fi.com/theunnamedpoet

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: User @tfoust10 does cool drawings, including this single-line drawing! Check 'em out.
27 Man Tax: Adam Demos
“The present is the ever moving shadow that divides yesterday from tomorrow. In that lies hope.” - Frank Lloyd Wright I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting only on that, also comment about something you DID like. Balance the negativity. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator In a bad place financially, feel free to drop a tip in the tip jar.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Let's not forget a school shooting happened today too
item.description:
Truly horrific the live in an age where our children have to go to school wondering if they'll make it home alive.
I've said it once I'll say it a million times it's never been about protecting the children. It's always been about exploiting them for personal gain.
Source: https://share.google/nWTrcuAFwyKbOGY9k

item.title: History repeats over again and again.
item.description:
All these quotes
All the protests going on
Yet here we stand
Making memes
What changes are we making?
This world is only getting darker

item.dc:creator: LembachTheProfessor

item.title: To Charlie Kirk
item.description: Fp edit: making sure that I put this on every one of my post. I do not condone violence that occurred today. However, I am okay that he is gone. I'm not okay that this, and the children who are slain and attacked everyday do not push us in the direction of making any reasonable meaning change to mitigate these tragedies. Charlie Kirk was an asshole, A bigot, and one of the worst examples of a human being. But he did not deserve to be executed A seemingly proud sacrifice for the Second Amendment
item.dc:creator: SquaresNews

item.title: Gun reform in the name of Melissa Hortman
item.description: May 27, 1970 – June 14, 2025 Melissa Hortman - Wikipedia https://share.google/Y4KwadmdKMM6JRpCK On June 14, 2025, Hortman, her husband, and their golden retriever Gilbert,were shot and killed at their home by a man impersonating a police officer. Another lawmaker, John Hoffman, and his wife were shot earlier that night by the same man. Minnesota governor Tim Walz said the shooting appeared to be a politically motivated assassination and issued a proclamation that flags at all state buildings be flown at half-staff.[29] The suspect in the shooting was 57-year-old Vance Luther Boelter. He was arrested on June 15 after a large-scale manhunt.
item.dc:creator: TalachaDotNet

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1471 (sauropod shuffle)
item.description:
Let's get this bread or something
Pippin had a good time when I took him to the Museum of Northern Arizona, but he's not allowed back to hang with the ancestors, which i think is mildly racist.
Though one of his favorite chew toys is literally a dinosaur bone piece he picked out at a rock shop in Utah, so I guess I get why?
Trying to apply for food stamp benefits today so as to stretch my tiny finances further, but the website is being a whiny little bitch and not sending me a PIN. "PIN has been sent via phone or email" No it hasn't, bitch, it's lost in the goddamn nebula and I haven't received it because your website is made and run by republican douches who would rather I die then recieve a crumb of aid from the State because yall are so Sumerian/Fascist about what your definition of the State should be responsible for.
Guess I'll have to bite the bullet and wait three hours to talk to an actual person after I've posted this to figure out what's wrong. Only to be told that they can't because of some bullshit esoteric law from 1912.
Honestly, Grindr should just do this anyway.
Asshole in the corner can't even spell Thucydides right. No wonder he's become an incel. Well, that, and he's insufferable.
Just Sauropod Things
I'm down.
Probably should have saved this for a Bronze-age dump but idc
I like my food to make me sweat.
If I had a kid or two that used silverware I'd totally get these.
Field Artillery might also be a good way, but that really didn't occur to the Greeks.
Accurate. Though just as often if I leave the cage door open and put Pippin in the cage for the night, he crawls into bed and down into my shirt over my heart to sleep anyway. When I nap, he usually stands guard over my headboard.
Shrimp. Not even once.
What an odd Ankylosaur.
I hope people in my game like the random dinosaurs.
MY CABBAGES says Diocletian.
The Boii were a Celtic people from roughly where the modern Czech Republic is.
Nuthatches are cute birbs.
I love that it's merely "repel bad luck." Yeah, that's all the dismembered parts of the Savior are good for. Incidentally, I now have the idea for a horror DnD campaign....
Either that or its history or birbs.
I really want to see a Yellow-headed Blackbird.
Ah yes, good old Amphicoelias fragillimus, once posited to maybe perhaps be the longest Sauropod ever, if related to Diplodocus, somewhere between 130 and 200 feet long... the vertebrae has vanished, and all we have are Cope's drawings. Which were good enough to allow a re-assessment, and it's been now renamed Maraapunisarus fragillimus and reassessed as a rebbachisaurid sauropod. It was still bloody fucking large, though, probably was now a mere 115 feet long. I wish more fossils of this critter would be found.
I had a dream during my nap yesterday that a Ruff (a bizarre shorebird) was found near Winslow. My rare bird dreams, for some reason, have an odd tendency to come to pass, so im watching ebird alerts like a hawk.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "I'm sorry. What? Merp. Pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
